about.heading: Design with purpose and precision.
about.paragraph1: At Cheren's Interior we've been shaping homes and commercial spaces that feel as good as they look. Every project begins with listening.
about.paragraph2: We believe great design is invisible — it simply makes living easier, warmer, and more meaningful. Our studio handles every step: from initial concept and 3D visualization to furniture sourcing and final installation.

services.title: Our Services
services.intro: Every home has a story. We help you write it with thoughtful design choices, quality materials, and careful execution.

items.title: Interior Design
items.desc: Full-cycle interior design for residential and commercial spaces. From concept development to complete style packages and material selection.

items.title: 3D Visualization
items.desc: Photorealistic 3D renders and virtual walkthroughs so you can see exactly how your space will look before a single item is moved.

items.title: Furniture Selection
items.desc: Curated procurement of furniture, lighting, and decor from trusted European and Ukrainian suppliers — within your budget.

process.title: Our Process
process.intro: A transparent, collaborative process designed to deliver exceptional results on time and within budget.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.desc: We meet to understand your lifestyle, preferences, and goals. We review the space, take measurements, and define the project scope and budget.

steps.title: Concept & Design
steps.desc: Our team develops two or three distinct concept directions. We present mood boards, material palettes, and preliminary layouts for your feedback.

steps.title: 3D Visualization
steps.desc: Photorealistic renders of the approved concept let you experience the space before any works begin. Revisions until you love every corner.

steps.title: Execution & Handover
steps.desc: We manage all contractors, deliveries, and installations. You receive a complete, move-in-ready space with our after-project support guarantee.

items.quote: Cheren's Interior transformed our apartment completely. They listened to everything we wanted and delivered a home that feels like us — only better. The 3D renders were spot on; the real thing was even more beautiful.
items.name: Matei Cernat

items.quote: Working with this studio was effortless. They handled all the contractors, kept us updated, and finished two weeks ahead of schedule. Our kitchen and living space is now the heart of our home.
items.name: Ana Voinea

items.quote: I had a very specific vision and limited budget. The team found creative solutions at every turn. The result exceeds what I imagined was possible. Highly recommend for anyone who wants real expertise.
items.name: Bianca Rădulescu

items.quote: From the first meeting to final handover, Cheren's Interior was professional, creative, and a pleasure to work with. Our children's room is magical. They even sourced furniture we thought was out of our range.
items.name: David Munteanu

contact.title: Let's create something beautiful.
contact.intro: Ready to transform your space? Tell us about your project and we'll arrange a free 30-minute consultation to discuss your vision.
contact.quote: Every space tells a story. Let's write yours.
